sections_cited: Section 4B of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 244 of 2018 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on Misc. No. 951/2018 2. For hearing of main case 24.03.2025 Mr. Inzimam Sharif, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ameer Bakhsh Metlo, advocate for respondent The petitioner has impugned a notice for super tax issued under Section 4B of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Learned counsel states that the notice is unwarranted in view of Division Bench judgment of this court reported as 2021 PTD 885. Be that as it may, he states that notice shall be contested before the issuing authority. He seeks that the notice be adjudicated by the authority vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending the aforesaid no coercive action be against the petitioner. Learned counsel for respondent articulates no cavil in such regard and states that the petition be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
